title: Integrated Photonics: Silicon Photonics and Lithium Niobate Platforms
description: Explore the fabrication and capabilities of integrated photonic platforms for scalable quantum computing, including silicon photonics and lithium niobate on insulator.
learningObjectives: Understand waveguide physics and mode confinement
Compare silicon and lithium niobate photonic platforms
Explain integrated beam splitters, phase shifters, and modulators
Describe on-chip photon sources and detectors
Analyze scalability advantages and challenges of integrated photonics
